src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Update method call from getMessage to getErrorMessage to align with refactored error handling API.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Ci.general_idea: Refactor a single generic circuit breaker bean into two distinct beans for web client and repository components to allow independent configuration.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Ci.human_impl: Replaced single `circuitBreaker()` method with `webClientCircuitBreaker()` and `repositoryCircuitBreaker()` methods, each registering a specific name.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Dropwizard Timer.Context with Micrometer MetricsRecorderTimer to align with the metrics library migration.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Changed parameter type from Timer.Context to MetricsRecorderTimer in finalizeResult

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace deprecated doAfterSuccessOrError with doOnEach to ensure compatibility with Reactor 3.4+ used in Spring Boot 3/JDK 21.
Simplify error handling logic by using onErrorMap for specific exception types instead of manual instanceof checks in onErrorResume.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Replaced manual instanceof checks in onErrorResume with chained onErrorMap calls

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Introduce ConditionalLogger to handle sampling-based logging for high-volume error scenarios like resource not found.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Added ConditionalLogger field and usage in handleErrorMetrics for ResourceNotFoundException

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Add specific error handling and logging for DataBufferLimitException to track request size limit violations.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Added instanceof check for DataBufferLimitException with conditional error logging

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Extract metric recording logic into a dedicated helper method to reduce code duplication and improve readability.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Created private recordMetric method and replaced inline metricsRecorder calls

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Refactor HTTP status code metric recording into a separate method using Signal API for cleaner separation of concerns.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Moved status code logic from handleErrorMetrics to new handleErrorStatusCodes method

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace concrete GraphiteMetricsRecorder dependency with the abstract MetricsRecorder interface to decouple error handling from specific metric implementations.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: import org.prebid.cache.metrics.MetricsRecorder; ... public ErrorHandler(final MetricsRecorder metricsRecorder, ...)

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Update the method call for recording invalid request metrics to match the new MetricsRecorder interface API.
Remove import for com.codahale.metrics.Timer which is part of the deprecated Dropwizard metrics library.
Remove import for GraphiteMetricsRecorder which was replaced by the new MetricsRecorder interface.
Add import for the new MetricsRecorder.MetricsRecorderTimer inner class used for timing.
Add import for Spring's @Value annotation to inject configuration properties.
Replace GraphiteMetricsRecorder dependency with the new MetricsRecorder interface in the constructor.
Add samplingRate parameter injected via @Value to support conditional logging or metrics sampling.
Pass samplingRate to the parent class constructor to initialize conditional logging capabilities.
Rename circuitBreaker parameter to webClientCircuitBreaker for clarity, though functionality remains similar.
Assign the renamed webClientCircuitBreaker parameter to the circuitBreaker field.
Replace optional timer context creation with a direct call to createRequestTimerForServiceType.
Change timerContext parameter type from Timer.Context to MetricsRecorderTimer to align with new metrics API.
Remove hardcoded LOCALHOST check and simplify proxy host validation using containsIgnoreCase.
Replace mark() with increment() for proxy failure metrics to align with Micrometer API.
Replace mark() with increment() for proxy success metrics to align with Micrometer API.
Replace mark() with increment() for proxy failure metrics in the handle block to align with Micrometer API.
Remove explicit CircuitBreakerOperator transform as it is likely handled elsewhere or implicitly.
Remove explicit timeout operator as it is likely handled elsewhere or implicitly.
Adjust indentation and formatting in resolveCacheUrl method.
Adjust indentation and formatting in fromClientResponse method.
Adjust indentation and formatting in createServerResponse method.
Replace concrete GraphiteMetricsRecorder with abstract MetricsRecorder interface to decouple handler from specific metrics implementation.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.human_impl: Changed import and field type from GraphiteMetricsRecorder to MetricsRecorder

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Inject sampling rate via Spring @Value annotation to support new base class initialization.
Pass sampling rate to parent constructor to initialize shared logic in CacheHandler.
Replace concrete GraphiteMetricsRecorder with abstract MetricsRecorder interface to decouple from specific metrics implementation.
Update timer creation call to use new non-optional API in MetricsRecorder.
Move circuit breaker application from repository operations to external HTTP client calls only.
Update metric recording calls from mark() to increment() to align with new metrics library API.
Remove imports for classes no longer used directly in this file due to refactoring.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/helpers/J.general_idea: Add import for JsonSyntaxException to support explicit exception handling in JSON deserialization.
Wrap JSON deserialization in a try-catch block to log errors when decoding fails, improving observability.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/helpers/J.human_impl: try { return gson.fromJson(json, type); } catch (JsonSyntaxException e) { log.error("Failed to decode JSON payload: '{}'", json); throw e; }

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.general_idea: Migrate metrics implementation from Dropwizard to Micrometer to align with modern Spring Boot standards.
Register the metrics recorder as a Spring-managed bean to enable dependency injection.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.human_impl: @Component public class MetricsRecorder { ... public MetricsRecorder(MeterRegistry meterRegistry) { ... }

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.general_idea: Implement timer functionality using Micrometer's Timer API to replace previous timing logic.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.human_impl: public class MetricsRecorderTimer { ... sample = Timer.start(meterRegistry); ... sample.stop(timer); }

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.general_idea: Implement counter functionality using Micrometer's Counter API for various error and success metrics.
Add logic to handle dynamic metric name prefixes for graphite export compatibility.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/metrics/M.human_impl: protected static final String PREFIX_PLACEHOLDER = "\\$\\{prefix\\}"; ... .replaceAll(PREFIX_PLACEHOLDER, prefix)

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/model/Pay.general_idea: Add Jackson annotation to ignore unknown properties during deserialization to prevent errors from unexpected fields.

Add @NotNull annotation to maxRetry field to enforce non-null constraint.
